items.title: Fill in Apache 2.0 copyright notice in claude-api LICENSE.txt (#990)
items.snippet: Replace the [yyyy] [name of copyright owner] placeholder with the actual copyright holder so the license attribution is explicit.

items.title: chore: update claude-api skill (#956)
items.snippet: Add shared/model-migration.md and refresh model references, managed agents docs, and skill description across all language guides.

items.title: Add proper front-matter to SKILL.md for claude-api (#897)
items.snippet: * Add proper front-matter to SKILL.md for claude-api  Added metadata section with name, description, and license information.  * Apply suggestion from @ericharmeling  ---------  Co-authored-by: Eric Harmeling <eric.harmeling@outlook.com>

items.title: Update claude-api skill with Managed Agents guidance (#891)
items.snippet: * Update claude-api skill with Managed Agents guidance  * Replace OPUS_ID placeholder with concrete model string in claude-api skill  * Replace remaining model placeholders with concrete model names and IDs

items.title: skill-creator: drop ANTHROPIC_API_KEY requirement from description optimizer (#547)
items.snippet: improve_description.py now calls `claude -p` as a subprocess instead of the Anthropic SDK, so users no longer need a separate ANTHROPIC_API_KEY to run the description optimization loop. Same auth pattern run_eval.py already used for the triggering eval.  Prompts go over stdin (they embed the full SK

items.title: Add claude-api skill (#515)
items.snippet: Documentation skill for building applications with the Claude API and Agent SDK. Covers Python, TypeScript, Java, Go, Ruby, C#, PHP, and cURL with language-specific guides for:  - Messages API basics, streaming, and error handling - Tool use (tool runner and manual agentic loop) - Structured outputs
